events.title: Lunar New Year Sound Journey
events.description: Please join me for a sound journey to mark the Lunar New Year — a 1 hour journey of gongs and bowls from the Himalayas.

events.title: Full Moon Sound Bath
events.description: Bathe in the resonance of crystal bowls and gongs under the full moon's energy. Release what no longer serves you and welcome new intentions.

events.title: Autumn Equinox Ceremony
events.description: Mark the turning of the seasons with a special outdoor sound ceremony. As day and night find balance, we'll journey through sound to find our own equilibrium.

events.title: New Moon Soundbath
events.description: Come join us for an evening soundbath
